name: Sweet Potato Tempura
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the deep fat fryer to 365 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Wash the sweet potatoes.
3. Parboil the sweet potatoes for about 10 minutes.
4. Pare the sweet potatoes and cut into half-inch wide x half-inch thick strips.
5. Dip the sweet potato strips into the tempura batter.
6. Place the sweet potato strips in the skimmer and gently lower them into the deep fat fryer.
7. Remove the sweet potato strips from the hot fat with the skimmer when they float to the surface and have turned golden brown.
8. Serve hot.
